name: Xiamen International Port Co., Ltd
summary: Xiamen International Port Co., Ltd operates port terminals primarily in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China. It operates through Container Loading and Unloading and Storage Business; Bulk/General Cargo Loading and Unloading Business; Comprehensive Port Logistic Services; Manufacturing and Selling of Building Materials; and Merchandise Trading Business segments. It engages in the container, bulk, and general cargo loading, unloading, and storage businesses, as well as provides port comprehensive logistics services comprising port-related logistics, tugboat berthing and unberthing, shipping agency, and tallying services; manufactures, processes, and sells building materials; and trades in merchandise, including steel and chemical raw materials. It also offers container deposit, land transport, logistics management, national and international freight agency services; operates and manages equipment at the transformer substation; repairs, maintains, cleans, and renovates containers; commodity export agency and sales services; and stacking and storage management, container packing and unpacking, and storage and container cargo inspection services. It is involved in the construction of roads; and long term investment and development business. It offers agency services for import and export of products, technology, international and domestic agency services, and international air transportation; and keeping, warehousing and labour services. It provides freight forwarding, warehousing, port supporting, packing and processing, logistics and distribution, customs declaration, and logistics information consulting services; and engages in the wholesale of pre-packaged food. It owns and operates 35 berths for containers, and bulk and general cargo of international and domestic trade. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China. Xiamen International Port Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of Xiamen Port Holding Group Co., Ltd.
